title: json-output-module
body:
## Parent Story
#4

## Complexity
low

## Files
src/output.rs

---

## Overview

Add JSON output formatting to the existing output module. This enables scripting and tool integration by providing structured output.

## Implementation

Extend `src/output.rs` with JSON output support. Add to the existing file:

```rust
use serde::Serialize;
use crate::types::RollResult;

#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
pub struct JsonOutput {
    pub input: String,
    pub notation: String,
    pub rolls: Vec<i32>,
    pub kept: Vec<i32>,
    pub dropped: Vec<i32>,
    pub modifier: i32,
    pub total: i32,
    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    pub fate_ladder: Option<String>,
}

impl From<(String, String, &RollResult)> for JsonOutput {
    fn from((input, notation, result): (String, String, &RollResult)) -> Self {
        JsonOutput {
            input,
            notation,
            rolls: result.rolls.clone(),
            kept: result.kept.clone(),
            dropped: result.dropped.clone(),
            modifier: result.modifier_total,
            total: result.total,
            fate_ladder: result.fate_ladder.clone(),
        }
    }
}

pub fn format_json(input: &str, notation: &str, result: &RollResult) -> String {
    let output = JsonOutput::from((input.to_string(), notation.to_string(), result));
    serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap_or_else(|_| "{}".to_string())
}
```

## Files to Modify

- `src/output.rs` - Add JSON output functions and types

## Dependencies

Requires Story 1 (#2) to be complete for:
- `RollResult` type from `crate::types`
- `serde` crate (already in Story 1)

## Success Criteria

- `JsonOutput` struct compiles with serde Serialize
- `From<(String, String, &RollResult)>` trait impl works correctly
- `format_json()` produces valid JSON string
- JSON output includes all roll details: input, notation, rolls, kept, dropped, modifier, total
- `fate_ladder` field is optional and only included when present
- Pretty-printed JSON is human-readable
- Returns empty object `{}` if serialization fails (graceful fallback)

---

## Implementation Context

This chunk contains everything needed for implementation. The spec has been
validated for completeness before reaching you.

If you find yourself wanting to search the codebase or read files not
mentioned here, that's signal the spec is incomplete. Output:
`CHUNK_BLOCKED: <what information is missing>`

Trust the spec. Implement what's described.
